people.biography: Born in Appleton, WI. Schoolteacher.

people.name: Pieter Coenen

report:
# Sample Research Report

This is sample fixture data for development and testing. It includes 38 people across 6 generations with both paternal and maternal lines, multiple children per couple, and diverse ethnic backgrounds (Dutch, German, Irish).

config.heroSubtitle: Tracing the Coenen family from Zeeland, Netherlands to Green Bay, Wisconsin
config.footerTagline: 6 Generations · Zeeland, Netherlands to Wisconsin, USA
